codex_response:
Implemented `195ba7dc` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: split the 5x13 input around the center red divider column, compare the two 5x6 halves cellwise, and output `1` wherever either half has `7`, else `0`.

The summary hint was used because it matched the official examples. No new primitive was needed. The generator keeps the official family shape by fixing the `5x13` layout, using a solid red divider, producing dense orange/black masks on both halves, and enforcing nontrivial `left-only`, `right-only`, and `both` contributions so the OR output stays in-family.
